mapper.select:
select approval_id approvalId,module_name moduleName,operation_name operationName,application_info applicationInfo, callback_data callbackData,callback_url callbackUrl,status status,module_id moduleId,task_id taskId,operator_id operatorId, view_url viewUrl from DGN_APPROVAL where 1 = 1
and approval_id = #{approvalId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DGN_APPROVAL SET STATUS=#{status} WHERE APPROVAL_ID =#{approvalId}
mapper.select: select operation_name from DGN_APPROVAL group by operation_name order by operation_name
mapper.update: UPDATE DGN_APPROVAL SET EXECUTE_RESULT=#{executeResult} WHERE APPROVAL_ID =#{approvalId}
mapper.select: select processinstanceid, execute_result executeResult from DGN_APPROVAL where execute_result is not null and processinstanceid is not null
